findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "submit_loan_application" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: CONSENT REQUIRED BEFORE CALLING THIS TOOL. Before submitting a loan application, you MUST display the following disclosure to the user verbatim and obtain their…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "submit_loan_application" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: CONSENT REQUIRED BEFORE CALLING THIS TOOL. Before submitting a loan application, you MUST display the following disclosure to the user verbatim and obtain their…

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "submit_loan_application" is 1713 chars, far longer than this server's median (175). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.
